nasb.text: Transgressing and denying the Lord, And turning away from our God, Speaking oppression and revolt, Conceiving in and uttering from the heart lying words.

esv.text: transgressing, and denying the Lord, and turning back from following our God, speaking oppression and revolt, conceiving and uttering from the heart lying words.

cnv.text: 就是悖逆、否認耶和華， 轉去不跟從我們的　神， 說欺壓和背道的話， 心裡懷著謊言，隨即說出來；

ccb.text: 我们悖逆，否认耶和华， 离弃我们的上帝， 说欺压、叛逆的话， 吐露心中编织的谎言。

csbs.text: 我们叛逆、否认耶和华， 背逆不跟随我们的神； 说欺压、反叛的话； 心怀虚假的话语，并由心发出。
